title: Refine repository comparison range picker
summary: Repository comparison now uses an ordered range picker that prevents reversed snapshot ranges and makes snapshot selection clearer.
userVisibleChange: Users can compare repository snapshots by clicking timeline rows; EVE automatically keeps the earlier and later endpoints in chronological order and avoids reversed-range errors.

risks.title: Large repositories still show a scrollable snapshot list, so filtering may be useful later.

decisions.title: Use a single ordered range picker inside the repository Compare tab instead of separate From and To selection controls.

validation.command: Playwright verified /repositories/eve Compare tab range selection with the reported snapshot pair avoids the reversed snapshot range error.
